user.title: Absaar Inverter Setup
user.description: How should Home Assistant connect to your inverter?

menu_options.local: Local (inverter connects directly to Home Assistant)

local.title: Absaar Local
local.description: Home Assistant will listen for the inverter's datalogger on the given TCP port. Optionally provide the datalogger's web address so the integration can keep it pointed at Home Assistant automatically.

data.listener_ip: Home Assistant IP for the datalogger (optional, auto-detected)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Absaar EMS server. Please try again later.
error.port_in_use: This TCP port is already in use. Choose a different port.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

init.title: Absaar Local Settings
init.description: Adjust the local connection without re-creating the entry (e.g. when the datalogger got a new IP).

data.listener_ip: Home Assistant IP for the datalogger (optional, auto-detected)

abort.cloud_has_no_options: Cloud connections have no adjustable settings.
